title: Stripe Tax provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Stripe Tax integration. Stripe Tax is integrated with Stripe billing — the tenant's existing Stripe API key is reused.

stripe_account_id.description: The tenant's Stripe account ID. Reused from the tenant's Stripe billing config (transaction module in Wave 4).

api_key_reference.description: Reference to the tenant's Stripe secret key stored in the transaction module (finance::TransactionProviderConfig). NOT the raw key — a lookup ID to prevent duplicate credential storage.

tax_behaviour_default.description: Stripe Tax tax_behaviour default. 'exclusive' = tax added to price; 'inclusive' = tax included in displayed price.

tax_id_collection.description: true = collect customer tax IDs (VAT / GST / EIN) via Stripe Checkout. Improves accuracy for B2B.

monitoring_enabled.description: true = enable Stripe Tax's nexus monitoring (economic-nexus threshold tracking + registration recommendations).
